title: Query with CASE and nested functions results in very long execution
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), age INT CHECK (age >= 0));
SELECT CASE WHEN age IS NULL THEN 'Unknown' ELSE name END AS user_name FROM users;
SELECT CASE WHEN id = 1 THEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users) ELSE (SELECT AVG(age) FROM users) END AS result FROM users;
key_bug_features: Query with CASE and nested functions
